description_long: This is a rectangular, peach-colored toolbox with a hinged lid that opens upward, revealing a dark, velvet-like interior with multiple organized slots for tools or accessories. The main compartment contains several uniquely shaped, gold and ivory-toned objects, each fitted into its own slot, suggesting a custom or specialized tool set. A pull-out drawer is integrated into the front of the box, also lined with the same dark material and holding additional items. The exterior is smooth and unadorned, with clean, sharp edges and a minimalist design. The lid appears to be solid and robust, providing secure coverage for the contents. The overall construction suggests a blend of wood or high-quality plastic for the body, with possible metal or composite accents for the internal tool holders.
description: A sleek, peach-colored toolbox with a hinged lid, velvet-lined compartments, and a pull-out drawer, containing custom-shaped gold and ivory tools.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, main compartment with organized tools, and the extended pull-out drawer.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the box, the open lid, and the arrangement of tools in both the main compartment and drawer.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the interior layout of the main compartment, with the lid open and the drawer less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the open lid, the side of the box, and the pull-out drawer with its contents.
attribute_handle_type: No visible external handle; the box is likely carried by gripping the sides or bottom.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No visible latch or locking mechanism; the lid appears to rest closed without a clasp.
attribute_compartment_configuration: One main compartment with six custom slots for tools, lined with dark velvet, and one pull-out drawer at the front with two additional slots; all compartments appear fixed.
